mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYS_BACKUP_TEMPLATE_ITEM (MR_ID, MR_BOOK_ID, MR_ITEM_NAME, MR_ITEM_TYPE, MR_ICON, MR_SORT, MR_CREATE_BY, MR_CREATE_TIME, MR_UPDATE_BY, MR_UPDATE_TIME, MR_IS_DELETED) SELECT MR_ID, MR_BOOK_ID, MR_ITEM_NAME, MR_ITEM_TYPE, MR_ICON, MR_SORT, MR_CREATE_BY, MR_CREATE_TIME, MR_UPDATE_BY, MR_UPDATE_TIME, MR_IS_DELETED FROM FIN_TEMPLATE_ITEM WHERE MR_BOOK_ID = #{bookId} AND MR_IS_DELETED = 0
